verdicts.note: Free health insurance does not specify a universal public or single-payer system, so it cannot be placed on the health-system mechanism axis.
Calling housing a right implies a public-guarantee direction, but no social-housing, tenant-protection, or implementation proposal supports maximal +2.

His explicit tax positions are eliminating senior property tax and sales tax on necessities. Expansive benefits affect spending but do not supply evidence of progressive revenue, so a +1 tax score is unsupported.
Parental authority supports the direction, but the dossier documents no specific curriculum or gender-content policy warranting maximal strength.

review_notes: All fifteen scores were reviewed. Generic lower-housing-cost and rural-health-access goals were not proposed as missing mechanism scores.
